today_quote.label: Today's one line
today_quote.text: Even for five minutes a day, feel the joy of doing something you set for yourself.
today_quote.author: Yeonsosa

philosophy.title: Three Pillars of Yeon
philosophy.subtitle: The ground this house stands on

pillar1.title: The 5·2·5·5 Method
pillar1.summary: Five minutes. Two minutes. Five hours. Five days. A rhythm of review.
pillar1.description: Five minutes right after class, two minutes right after studying, then five hours later, then five days later. These four passes turn knowledge into something truly your own.

pillar2.title: Mindful Engagement
pillar2.description: Through meditation, handwriting, and small rituals, we gather the mind. The time gathered that way is what real learning is made of.

pillar3.title: Caring · Learning · Playing
pillar3.summary: Divide the day in three. Grow balance.
pillar3.description: Time for others (caring), time for yourself (learning), time to recover (playing). When these three balance, a whole person grows.
